transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: Concrete animal, workplace, supermarket, and optical-illusion examples give the argument texture, but repeated rhetorical questions, emphatic slogans, escalating claims, and a checklist recap make the chapter feel prolonged and overmanaged.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Observed examples supply welcome specificity, yet the same points are repeatedly restated through questions, capitals, warnings, and directives; the final summary inventories prior claims instead of creating fresh forward momentum.

parsed.generic_mechanism: Identical sequencing, syntax, examples, emphasis, and ending structure necessarily produce equivalent reading experiences.

paraphrased_evidence.ours: Observed examples supply welcome specificity, yet the same points are repeatedly restated through questions, capitals, warnings, and directives; the final summary inventories prior claims instead of creating fresh forward momentum.
paraphrased_evidence.ref: Concrete animal, workplace, supermarket, and optical-illusion examples give the argument texture, but repeated rhetorical questions, emphatic slogans, escalating claims, and a checklist recap make the chapter feel prolonged and overmanaged.
